experience.title: Software and AI Engineer
experience.description: Designed and implemented an AI-assisted clinical decision support system using Gemini and OpenAI APIs, integrating external medical databases (NIH) within an agent-based workflow architecture. Architected and developed an Inventory Management System using Next.js, NestJS, Prisma, and PostgreSQL.

experience.title: Founder
experience.description: Founded and lead a web and AI solutions studio delivering scalable full-stack systems for international clients. Developed AI-integrated systems including conversational agents, RAG-based assistants, and business automation platforms.

experience.title: Top Rated Seller (Full Stack Developer)
experience.description: Achieved Top Rated status by completing 140+ global projects for 85+ unique customers with a 100% completion rate. Specialized in delivering high-impact web and software solutions.

experience.title: Full Stack Developer (Intern)
experience.description: Architected and developed enterprise web platforms for ALDAR using React.js, NestJS, and PostgreSQL. Implemented CI/CD pipelines using Docker and GitHub Actions.

experience.title: Intern Project Manager & Full Stack Developer
experience.description: Led a team of 8 developers on the Charms HMS platform. Directed frontend modernization from legacy systems to React-based architecture.

experience.title: Intern Mobile Developer
experience.description: Developed cross-platform mobile applications for healthcare sector using Flutter.
